title: Easter service recap video
what: Produce a short recap video from Easter Sunday coverage
why: Extend reach of the Easter event and support follow-up engagement
how: Edit multicam footage into a 60 to 90 second social-first cut
notes: Prioritize crowd reactions, worship highlights, and sermon close.
flow: Open with atmosphere, move into worship energy, end with call-to-action.
content: Deliver a polished recap with captions for Instagram, YouTube, and internal presentation use.

title: Youth night promo graphics
what: Create social promo graphics and announcement slide set
when: Ahead of Friday youth night launch
where: Instagram stories, WhatsApp groups, and in-service screens
why: Drive attendance and give the event a clear visual identity
how: Reuse the existing youth palette with bold copy and square plus story crops
notes: Need one static hero slide and three social cutdowns.

title: Midweek Bible study livestream package
what: Prepare lower thirds, stream slate, and livestream support notes
why: Keep the midweek teaching stream operationally consistent
how: Use standard stream templates and event run sheet
content: Package already delivered and used in the live session.

title: Volunteer training handout redesign
what: Refresh the onboarding handout for new volunteer intake
why: Improve clarity and reduce repetitive onboarding questions
how: Simplify copy, add icons, and break the content into short sections
notes: Keep the final file printable in grayscale.

title: Conference interview shoot plan
what: Plan and capture interview pickups during the conference
when: Across the two main conference days
where: Green room and lobby interview corner
why: Gather post-event testimonial content for recap and next-year promotion
how: Two-camera interview setup with lightweight lighting and audio kit
flow: Speaker arrivals, short interview windows, same-day media backup.

title: Sunday announcement lower thirds refresh
what: Refresh the lower-third graphics for weekly announcements
where: LED screens and stream graphics output
why: Align lower thirds with the updated event visual language
how: Adjust template spacing, typography, and event color accents

title: School outreach mini-doc
what: Produce a short documentary-style outreach story
where: Partner school and donor presentation deck
why: Showcase community impact with a stronger story package
how: Combine interview footage, classroom b-roll, and supers
content: Completed, approved, and archived after delivery.

title: Women’s breakfast photo coverage
who: Women’s ministry attendees and internal comms team
what: Cover the breakfast event with photo selects for recap use
why: Provide same-week recap content and ministry archives
how: Photo-first coverage with a shortlist delivered by end of day
notes: Need at least 20 usable selects plus 5 hero images.
